recentTweets.text:
Pharmaceutical companies, like AbbVie and AstraZeneca, abuse the U.S. patent system to monopolize the drug market and prevent patients from accessing affordable drugs.

We must develop more stringent standards that reward real innovation and crack down on corporate profiteering. https://t.co/xagm4WvlmW

The Supreme Court is facing a major corruption crisis.

I'm proud to introduce the High Court Gift Ban Act, with @RepRaskin and @SenatorLujan, to remove the influence of dark money from our nation’s highest judicial body.

We must safeguard the sanctity of our democracy.
RT @NYCMayor: NYC, high heat is back. Today the city will feel like nearly 100 degrees.   This heat wave will not be as long or intense as…

Israel must release pediatrician Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya, who has been held without charge for 18 months and now faces an imminent threat to his life from torture.

Israel must end the targeting of health workers and the inhumane treatment of Palestinians in arbitrary detention.

I am devastated by the death of Tibetan freedom activist Lobga Rangzen. As we mourn his loss, we continue to fight for human rights in Tibet and across the globe. 

My heart is with his loved ones and our entire Tibetan community in NY-14.

As America marks 250 years, may we recommit to building a diverse democracy, an economy that works for the many and not just the few, and a future where every generation has the opportunity to live a dignified life.

Happy 4th of July!
RT @nyc311: Extreme heat can be dangerous, especially for older adults and people with health conditions. Here's how you can stay safe when…

Today an extreme heat watch is in effect across NYC!

Dangerous temperatures are expected to rise into the 100s.

Locate the nearest cooling center at https://t.co/FqIVJMyDRX or by calling 311.

To get emergency updates, visit https://t.co/My92lOVAuH or text NOTIFYNYC to 692-692.
My statement on the Tenth Anniversary of PROMESA ⬇️ https://t.co/FPnwmy6vMU

RT @NYCMayor: We’re bracing for a historic heat wave. The best way to stay safe is to stay in air conditioning. 

Cooling centers are alrea…

Due to Trump’s OBBBA, the New York State Department of Health has notified 450,000 Essential Plan members that their insurance coverage will end tomorrow, July 1st.

If you are among those impacted, you can navigate to https://t.co/McoFOeXw7E or call 1-855-355-5777 for more info.
RT @DropSiteNews: ⚡️ New: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has introduced an amendment that could effectively halt all offensive and defensive…

RT @nycemergencymgt: Extreme heat arrives Wednesday. Today, while it is still mild, is the day to get ready.

Take a few minutes to safely…

To those in NY-14 and beyond with family and loved ones in Venezuela, we stand with you in this moment of tragedy.

As we monitor the situation, I want to alert constituents of the below guidance from the Department of State.  (1/2)

Americans in Venezuela can call +1-202-501-4444 for consular assistance. Friends and family in the U.S. worried about loved ones can call +1-888-407-4747.

If you're abroad, enroll in the Smart Traveler Enrollment Program to receive safety updates at https://t.co/HUFfmBphef (2/2)
RT @Acyn: AOC: They come in the right way, they fill out their paperwork, they have gotten a job, they’re participating in our economy, the…
RT @Acyn: AOC on Inflation: It’s not easy to just find a cheaper apartment when every apartment or every home in your area is the same unaf…

Today marks four years since the Supreme Court ended the constitutional right to abortion.

Now, reproductive freedoms are under sustained attack across the country, regularly endangering the lives of those in need of care.

We must protect reproductive health care at all costs.

NYCHA Tenant Associations play a vital role in advocating for residents on issues like housing conditions, safety, and tenant rights.

It was great to connect with our NYCHA TA Presidents to discuss priorities for our community in the year ahead. https://t.co/LLwxSARTyg
RT @nycemergencymgt: Thunderstorms and the chance of flash flooding move into NYC today. Heavy rain, strong winds, hail, and lightning are…

Juneteenth reminds us that freedom is hard fought, but guaranteed when we organize and refuse to back down.

The work is not done. Today, we celebrate Black American resistance and resilience, and recommit to the transformation required to deliver real equity and justice for all.
RT @nycemergencymgt: 🌡️ Round two, New York. Friday is the last hot day of this stretch, with the heat index peaking near 97°F (36°C) in th…

In 2022, for-profit health insurers paid $10B in compensation to agents and brokers for enrolling individuals into Medicare Advantage plans.

My legislation would bar financial perks for agents and brokers and ensure they work with patients to choose the best plan for them. https://t.co/EGxVvDmPmv

RT @NydiaVelazquez: A status bill that includes colonialism as an option is not decolonization.

@RepAOC & I oppose the Resident Commission…

New Yorkers deserve a government that prioritizes them.

The Commission on Government Efficiency (COGE) has been tasked with making City government work better for everyone.

Share your thoughts. Sign up to speak at a public hearing at https://t.co/0YLPlkNAJf

🗣️HEAP Cooling Assistance closes TOMORROW at 5pm!

Eligible households can receive help buying and installing an air conditioner or fan to help their home stay cool.

Don't wait, apply today at https://t.co/H456Z1fYLc or in person at your local social services or HRA office.

Trump’s illegal war in Iran has descended our world and our global economy into chaos.

Yesterday, the House finally met the threshold to pass a War Powers Resolution.

The Senate must work quickly to advance this resolution and end this war.

RT @RepCasar: I brought AOC tortillas from H-E-B.

They make people feel better after a tough night, and that's what the Spurs are going to…

Reading is one of the best ways we can build our personal and community power.

That’s why I’m thrilled to announce a Summer Reading Challenge for NY-14 constituents.

Read 10 books before Sept. 1st and submit your completed log to my office.

Learn more: https://t.co/QDs8iT9Y5W https://t.co/4qIzBsYJ6f

🏳️‍🌈Happy Pride Month!🏳️‍🌈

Let us be encouraged and emboldened by the strength and resilience of the queer community. 

We will continue to walk with and for you in the fight for LGBTQIA+ rights in NY-14 and across the globe 🏳️‍⚧️✨

RT @NYCMayor: Eid Mubarak!

Today as we honor Prophet Ibrahim, Eid al-Adha reminds us that sacrifice is not a burden. It is an opportunity…

Wishing a joyous and blessed Eid al-Adha to all those observing today.

On this special day to so many in our community, we send our warmest wishes for a wonderful time with your family.

Eid Mubarak!

On Memorial Day, let us remember and honor the brave Americans who gave their lives in service to our country. 

We are forever grateful for their courage, and recommit ourselves to building a country worth their ultimate sacrifice.

This is what drinking water in Georgia looks like after Meta began data center construction in the community. 

Today I called for EPA and Congressional investigations into the impact of data center construction on local drinking water supplies.

We cannot take water for granted. https://t.co/jQlaJ0TXFV

RT @nycHealthy: It's going to be hot again today, NYC! A heat advisory is in effect and cooling centers are open across the city.

Find you…
RT @nycemergencymgt: ☀️ Hot and humid weather is expected across NYC today, with temperatures reaching 91 to 94°F and heat index values aro…

My heart is with the loved ones of the three victims killed and the entire San Diego community impacted by last night’s shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego.

We must all recommit ourselves to the work of rooting out Islamophobia and all forms of bigotry.

Access to affordable, fresh food should not be a luxury determined by zip code; it should be a right.

That is why I am grateful to Mayor Mamdani and the NYCEDC for their work to open a public grocery store in Hunts Point and strengthen food access across the South Bronx.
RT @RepRashida: The Nakba never ended. The Israeli apartheid regime is still committing genocide in Gaza and violently erasing entire commu…

I recently spoke with @ilazer about the material consequences of committee hearings.

When I caught the head of the EPA red handed for colluding with Bayer, it helped blow up Bayer’s liability shield in the Farm Bill.

This is what accountability looks like when we come prepared. https://t.co/0WDLrm37Zb
RT @nyknicks: go time. https://t.co/rwFN2WQyEo

It is time we bring down the cost of housing, healthcare, and child care.

I'm proud to co-lead the Congressional Progressive Caucus’s New Affordability Agenda, so we can put money back in the pockets of Americans and uphold our promises to working families. https://t.co/J2KxrJe8zW

Let May Day be a reminder of the courage of workers across the world demanding peace, fair wages, and better working conditions.

History demands more than standing with workers in spirit. We must fight alongside them in Congress every day.
RT @nyknicks: THE LARGEST HALFTIME LEAD IN NBA PLAYOFF HISTORY.

Tens of thousands of lawsuits have been filed against Bayer for failing to warn people about the risks of glyphosate exposure.

Now, EPA Administrator Zeldin and Trump are pushing for legal immunity to protect Bayer from being sued by Americans getting cancer from their product. https://t.co/9MZQumepLh

There is no place for political violence in our country.

I am relieved that the President and the attendees at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner last night are safe.

RT @RepPressley: An absolute joy to spend the morning at @HHCtweets with @RepAOC and @MayorWu.

Early education is everything and I am so e…
RT @WCVB: During a visit to Massachusetts Friday, Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez explained what she was saying to Secretary of Heal…

My team and I are closely monitoring the five-alarm fire at the First Reformed Church of Astoria and are in touch with NYC Emergency Management.

If you are in the surrounding area, close your windows and avoid smoky areas. Thank you to our first responders on the scene.

I am deeply saddened to hear of the passing of Congressman David Scott, who passionately served the people of Georgia's 13th district for more than 20 years.

Congressman Scott was a fierce advocate and will be sincerely missed. Our thoughts and prayers are with his family.

Giant health insurance companies, like UnitedHealth, are under investigation for corporate fraud through their Medicare Advantage plans.

We cannot give these companies one more taxpayer dollar, let alone the $13 billion HHS Secretary Kennedy just approved. https://t.co/M90ryKWNf3

RT @Acyn: PabloReports: Can you share anything about the words you exchanged yesterday with RFK Jr. after the hearing?

AOC: Oh, I mean, li…
RT @nyknicks: there's more in store  🎮 https://t.co/voe99u5PEu

There is no reason why the Bronx shouldn’t have the beautiful waterfront access and infrastructure that every other borough has.

That is why I am proud to have secured $1 million in federal funding to help restore public access to the East 132nd Street pier in Port Morris. https://t.co/C2qdgyFldq

Deportation is a matter of life-and-death for 350,000+ Haitian nationals in the U.S.

That is why I am proud to have voted to pass @RepPressley’s legislation to extend Haiti TPS and give our neighbors the critical protections they deserve.

Trump has threatened to use the U.S. military to carry out acts of genocide against the Iranian people.

Make no mistake: those that voted NO to the War Powers Resolution are actively endorsing that threat.

Congress must exercise our power to end this chaos. https://t.co/c2uDtZh6sX

We are wishing our Bengali community in NY-14 and beyond a very Happy Bengali New Year! We hope you are all able to spend this vibrant, lively, and joyful holiday with your loved ones. Shubho Noboborsho!

On Yom HaShoah, let us honor the six million victims of the Holocaust and brave Jewish resilience.

It is our responsibility to learn from such dark history and fiercely combat antisemitism across the board to protect our Jewish brothers and sisters.

🗣️Tax Filing Reminder! The deadline to file taxes is April 15th, and almost half of all New Yorkers can file through NYC Free Tax Prep at https://t.co/UfozsaMvXR

If you are unable to file before then, you can file for an extension at https://t.co/RIV59s8PPJ

kurdistanMentions.text: RT @Acyn: AOC: These companies are not paying for their own energy infrastructure. People energy bills around the country are skyrocketing…

My prayers are with the loved ones of the 6 American service members killed in a KC-135 crash in western Iraq yesterday.

Every life lost is an immeasurable tragedy.

We can and must end Trump’s war.
Read my statement on my recent appointment to the House Energy and Commerce Committee ⬇️ https://t.co/PIExGr7pQs

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy, Iraq / Baghdad / Kirkuk.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 2 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-03-25T21:03:41Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

Black women have the highest maternal mortality rate among all racial groups in the U.S.

During Black Maternal Health Week, let us refocus on how we can provide resources and rights that help Black mothers thrive before, during, and after pregnancy. We must pass the #Momnibus

Chag Pesach Sameach! We hope this Passover brings an abundance of prosperity and happiness to all who are celebrating in NY-14 and around the world. Have a wonderful Seder, and may your meal be plentiful and your questions be answered.

Today, @SenMarkey and I wrote to Secretary Burgum to oppose this administration’s decision to pay a French company nearly $1 billion to cancel offshore wind facilities off the East Coast.

This administration must stop using our tax dollars to prop up the fossil fuel industry. https://t.co/7cXbOYQLEa

RT @SenWarren: It's time that we give families the quality, affordable childcare that they deserve. 

Let's get this done. https://t.co/TFI…

On today's Transgender Day of Visibility I want our trans community to know that we support you, we see you, and we will always walk beside you.

Let us celebrate your joy, success, resilience, and courage today and everyday.🏳️‍⚧️

Our current drug scheduling system in the U.S. does little to deter drug abuse or overdose rates, but instead hinders research and unfairly criminalizes communities.

We need to invest in actual solutions like prevention, treatment, and recovery. https://t.co/CNkfaN795W

RT @SenSanders: It's time for a moratorium on the construction of new AI data centers.

My press conference with @RepAOC. https://t.co/XKYm…

Democrats put 9 bills forward to fund TSA.

Trump and Republicans blocked every bill because they want to tie TSA workers’ paychecks to billions in more unchecked funding for ICE.

The answer is clear: fund TSA and not ICE.

RT @Acyn: PabloReports: What’s your message to undocumented Americans who are thinking about maybe traveling by plane right now?

AOC: We s…
RT @Acyn: PabloReports: What do you make of your Republican colleagues who have said for months that ICE agents can only be safe if they we…
RT @LGAairport: LaGuardia Airport is now open, expect delays and/or cancellations.  Plan ahead and check with your airline for the latest u…

I'm heartbroken by the tragic collision at LaGuardia. My prayers are with the loved ones of the two pilots killed and all those injured.

LaGuardia is closed as investigations continue. Please check with your airline on the status of your flight before going to the airport. (1/2)
As more updates become available, Air Canada has set up a hotline for friends and families of affected passengers at 1-800-961-7099 (2/2).
Eid Mubarak! Wising a joyous Eid al-Fitr to all those observing in our NY-14 community and beyond. May your fasts and efforts be accepted🌙

If Paramount can shell out billions of dollars to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, then they can pay their unionized CBS staff a fair wage.

I stand with the CBS staff who walked out today as they fight these corporate giants for essential protections and fair contracts.

My prayers are with the loved ones of the 6 American service members killed in a KC-135 crash in western Iraq yesterday.

Every life lost is an immeasurable tragedy.

We can and must end Trump’s war.

I'm devastated by the antisemitic attack at one of our nation's largest reform synagogues. My heart is with the entire Temple Israel congregation.

Antisemitism has no place in our country. We owe it to our Jewish siblings to stamp it out and ensure they can worship without fear.

Happy International Women’s Day! I’m honored to be part of a legacy of women who pushed forward together to achieve the impossible. 

Today we celebrate the tenacity of those who made our progress possible, and the resolve it will take to create a better world for our children.

Republicans are using kids as a smokescreen for what Big Tech lobbyists want: a national surveillance program to harvest our data with zero protections for people and their privacy.

We must fight this dangerous expansion of surveillance technology. https://t.co/tOwjerkG54
